name: Chemical Industries (Far East) Limited
summary: Chemical Industries (Far East) Limited, an investment holding company, manufactures and sells chemicals primarily in Singapore and Myanmar. It operates through two segments, Industrial Chemicals and Properties. The company offers basic chemicals, such as chlorine, caustic soda, sodium hypochlorite, and hydrochloric acid, as well as hydrogen to the petro-chemical, pharmaceutical, electronics, polycarbonate, and water-treatment industries. It also manages and rents commercial properties. In addition, the company operates as a general carrier; and general merchant, importer, and exporter of chemicals. Further, it is involved in the treatment and disposal of waste, including remediation activities; and manufacture of water treatment, waste treatment, and oilfield chemicals. The company was founded in 1962 and is based in Singapore.
